privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. I discovered that the task is completely defective because all critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and the required input data files (such as water_main.top) are entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable and impossible to run.
